concerns.analysis: The North Carolina Emergency Management triangle logo is duplicated in the HTML output. In the source PDF, this standalone logo appears once in the bottom-right corner (in addition to a version inside the map graphic). In the HTML screenshot, the standalone logo is rendered twice: once as a large image at the top of the page (below the EMAP logo) and again at the bottom-right corner of the page. This is a visual duplication of body content.
